title: City life
prompt: Share your opinion about living in a big city.
reference_text: In my opinion, living in a big city is exciting because there are many opportunities.

title: Online learning
prompt: Give your view on studying online versus in a classroom.
reference_text: I think online learning is convenient, but classrooms help me stay focused.

title: Healthy habits
prompt: Explain one healthy habit you try to keep and why it matters.
reference_text: I try to walk every day because it gives me more energy and reduces stress.
